title: Per-Frame Detections Schema
description: Per-frame detection output produced by Wave 2 Worker B (Track B: model_retraining, extended with keypoint fallback hierarchy). Consumed by Track D (Kalman tracker), Track F (Viterbi decoder), and Track G (initialisation). DO NOT modify without coordinating all consumers.

fallback_tier_definition.tier_1: Keypoint base used directly. conf_keypoint_base >= tau_kp.
fallback_tier_definition.tier_2: VP-Projected base. Line through pole tip + vp_t from BEV schema intersected with horizon_y_px. Requires alpha_t > 0 from BEV schema. conf_keypoint_base < tau_kp AND alpha_t > 0.
fallback_tier_definition.tier_3: Bbox bottom-centre. Last resort. conf_keypoint_base < tau_kp AND alpha_t = 0. Emits is_degraded=true. Consumers should treat this position as LOW CONFIDENCE.

clip_id.description: Must match clip_id in sidecar PTS and BEV files.

detections.description: All gate detections in this frame. May be empty.

detection_id.description: Unique detection ID for this frame. Format: '{clip_id}_{frame_idx:05d}_{det_idx:03d}'

bbox_xyxy.description: Bounding box [x1, y1, x2, y2] in image pixels.

keypoint_base_px.description: YOLOv8-Pose keypoint for gate base. Null if not detected.

keypoint_tip_px.description: YOLOv8-Pose keypoint for pole tip. Null if not detected. Used for Tier-2 VP projection.

base_px.description: FINAL resolved gate base position in image pixels after applying fallback hierarchy. This is what all consumers must use — do NOT recompute fallback logic downstream.

base_fallback_tier.description: Which fallback tier produced base_px. 1=keypoint, 2=VP-projected, 3=bbox. Consumers may use this for confidence weighting.

is_degraded.description: True if base_fallback_tier = 3. Consumers should propagate this flag and suppress high-confidence decisions when true.

pole_vector_angle_deg.description: Angle of pole vector from vertical in degrees. Null if keypoints not available. Used for rolling shutter geometry validation — must be within ±(theta + 5°).

geometry_check_passed.description: True if pole_vector_angle_deg is within the rolling-shutter-aware bound ±(theta + 5°). False detections should be soft-penalised in tracker cost matrix, not hard-rejected.

emission_log_prob.description: Per-state log emission probabilities for the HMM. Computed at detection time and stored here so the FIFO buffer in Track G can run retroactive Viterbi without re-running the detector.

log_prob_red.description: log B(red | this detection). Must be <= 0.

log_prob_blue.description: log B(blue | this detection). Must be <= 0.

log_prob_dnf.description: log B(DNF | this detection). Must be <= 0.

colour_histogram.description: Optional. Compact colour histogram for soft appearance prior in tracker cost matrix. Array of floats.

aspect_ratio.description: Optional. Bbox aspect ratio (height/width) for soft appearance prior.
